name: Pporite
short_description: Abandon the tedious and systematic cultivation action rouge game, choose the right fruit and skills to cultivate the nearby Pporite, and skills react with Pporite, skills and skills to protect yourself until the arrival of 20 minutes...
detailed_description:
Official QQ group: 771775658

Random encounter of the Pporite

You will encounter different kinds of Pporite at random and choose to take risks with you. Each of them has different attributes and abilities. In fact, you are always protected.

Select various fruits

Choose a variety of fruits to cultivate Pporite, Fruit will improve the Pporite's various attributesand even allow it to further evolve.

Skills, and reactions

In the game, you will encounter multiple skills with various attributes at random, and different skills will have different reactions in the collision.
